---
title: "face_areas"
generated: true
description: "Per-face triangle area."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.mesh`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:face_areas -->
```python
face_areas(mesh: Mesh) -> Float[Array, 'n_faces']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:face_areas -->
Per-face triangle area.

$\text{area}_f = \tfrac{1}{2} \lVert (v_1 - v_0) \times
(v_2 - v_0) \rVert$ -- half the magnitude of the face cross product
(the same cross product [`compute_vertex_normals`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh/compute_vertex_normals.qmd) accumulates,
here taken as a magnitude).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:face_areas -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mesh` | `Mesh` | — | — | Triangle mesh. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n_faces`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:face_areas -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_faces` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
